title: data-science-harness project ledger (project.yaml)
description: The administrative source of truth at the dataset root, datalad save-d like any other artifact. Additive by design: new top-level keys are introduced per roadmap phase. Phase 1 adds `products` and `obligations` alongside the existing `project` header and append-only `log`.

project.description: Project header. Set once by project/new-project.

products.description: Named deliverables grouped from kept comparisons (analyze/manage-product), released and cross-linked by disseminate/*.

obligations.description: Outstanding commitments in the Manage & Comply lane (pre-registered comparisons, DMP/ethics/funder items).

contributors.description: People credited on the project, with CRediT roles and persistent identifiers (project/people). Feeds dataset_description.json Authors and DataCite creators.

log.description: Append-only activity log. Corrections are new entries; never rewrite or reorder prior entries.

comparisons.description: Comparison ids / cmp/* branch names that make up this product.

dois.description: Minted DOIs / persistent identifiers for released versions.

relations.description: DataCite RelatedIdentifier links to other products or external identifiers.

relation.description: DataCite relationType, e.g. IsSourceOf, IsSupplementTo, IsDerivedFrom, IsVariantFormOf.

target.description: A product id (this ledger) or an external DOI/URL.

ref.description: Pre-registration id / URL or other external reference.

roles.description: CRediT contributor roles (e.g. Conceptualization, Data curation, Formal analysis, Writing – original draft).

op.description: The skill operation, e.g. new-project, annotate, run-comparison, manage-product, publish.
